creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 185509
Update pdal to 1.5.0

It is a rather easy patch.

I have changed options adding pgsql and sqlite because where the port is used, both are used by default.

poudriere 10, 11 and 12 i386/amd64 OK
portlint ok

Changes:
https://github.com/PDAL/PDAL/releases/tag/1.5.0
